title: Complete DID resolution algorithm with verification methods
description: The existing `spec/did-method-bolyra.md` defines the DID syntax but lacks a complete resolution algorithm per W3C DID Core §7.1. Specify: (1) how `did:bolyra:<commitment>` resolves to a DID Document by querying IdentityRegistry events, (2) verification method entries mapping to the EdDSA Baby Jubjub keys (for agents) or the nullifier-based authentication (for humans), (3) service endpoints pointing to the on-chain registry. Without this, no DID resolver library can implement `did:bolyra` support.
